programs.title: Save My Skin
programs.sub_title: It Looks Like It's Gonna Pop!
programs.desc: Dr. Emma tackles a large golf ball sized cyst on Dave's cheek that is ruining his life; and one of Adam's multiple lipomas turns out to be a rare medical first for Dr. Emma, which is no mean feat!

programs.title: Save My Skin
programs.sub_title: It Just Makes You Feel Ugly
programs.desc: Chrissie had a lipoma removed 14 years ago, but it's grown back bigger than ever; it turns out to be a tricky lipoma; and Dr Emma has an ingenious plan to get rid of the big wart on Sian's foot.

programs.title: Save My Skin
programs.sub_title: I Am a Kind of Patchwork
programs.desc: Dillon doesn't want to go to college with a lump under his chin; Roger's gout jeopardizes his career; Cianca's smoking causes severe dermatitis; Amanda's annoying lipoma on her back.

programs.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programs.desc: Podiatrist Marion solves the mystery of Jonathan's twisted toes, gets marathon runner Robert's feet fit for his next race and helps a drag queen back into heels.

programs.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programs.desc: Marion solves the mystery of the V-shaped gap in Debra's toes; she has a surprising treatment for a psoriasis patient to stop the itch.

programs.title: One Day in My Body
programs.desc: Tiffany has progeria, a condition that causes her to age rapidly, yet she's already outlived her life expectancy; single dad Ryan was born with arthrogryposis, leaving his arms and legs fused.
